title: Kai Pesi Lyrics Thillu Mullu Songs Lyrics

Singer: Ranjith
Song: Kai Pesi
Movie: Thillu Mullu
Music: Yuvan		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Kai pesi en kooda sollaamaley
kai veesi sendraaley nillaamaley
naan indru kandeney moondram pirai
podhaadhu naan vazhum kaalam varai

Avalin azhagu analai vidavum
adhigam kodhikudhey
kodhika kodhika kushiyil ennadhu
idhayam kudhikudhey

Yaar meedhu kaadhal, eppodhu pookum
yaar solla koodum, sollaamal thaakum
en jadhagam kadhal yogam

Kai pesi en kooda sollaamaley
kai veesi sendraaley nillaamaley
naan indru kandeney moondram pirai
podhaadhu naan vazhum kaalam varai

Idhayathil yaarkum idamillai endru
dhinasari thazh pottu naan pootinen
udaithadhu neeye ul pugundhaye
thalaividhi un kaiyil naan maatinen

Ulagellaam urangayil uyirai nee
thayirai pol kadaikiraau
unarchiyil kirangayil
manadhai nee malar vandaai kudaikiraai

Ennakena neethaan ezhudhidum kadidham
padikiren anbae un facebook-il thaan

vizhugiren un kannin grace look-il thaan

Vidai illaa kelvi nee
nilakari oolal pol neelgiraai
thadaigalai thagarthu nee
adimayai arasi pol aalgiraai

Kai pesi en kooda sollaamaley
kai veesi sendraaley nillaamaley
naan indru kandeney moondram pirai
podhaadhu naan vazhum kaalam varai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kai Pesi?

The song captures a romantic and joyful theme, highlighting playful and loving interactions.

Who composed the music for Thillu Mullu?

The music for Thillu Mullu was composed by Yuvan.

What role does Kai Pesi play in the movie?

The song adds a light-hearted and romantic touch to the movie, enhancing the playful dynamics between characters.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kai Pesi?

The lyrics were penned by Na Muthukumar.

When was Thillu Mullu released?

The movie was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kai Pesi is a romantic melody from the movie Thillu Mullu, beautifully sung by Ranjith. The song, composed by Yuvan, features playful and loving lyrics by Na Muthukumar. It captures the essence of youthful romance and joy, making it a perfect fit for scenes depicting light-hearted interactions. The music and lyrics together evoke feelings of happiness and love, enhancing the film's romantic narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kai Pesi from the movie Thillu Mullu is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. With Yuvan's enchanting music and Ranjith's captivating vocals, this song is a perfect blend of modern beats and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of Na Muthukumar's words as they bring to life the playful and loving moments of the film.
stanzaMeanings: Using the phone, without telling me, she waved and left. I saw her today, without stopping. The crescent moon will not fade until the end of my life.
Her beauty is more intense than fire, it burns. My heart jumps with joy.
Who will love, when will it bloom? Who can say? It strikes without telling. My horoscope has love luck.
Using the phone, without telling me, she waved and left. I saw her today, without stopping. The crescent moon will not fade until the end of my life.
I locked my heart daily, saying there's no place for anyone. But you broke it and entered. My fate is in your hands.
While the world sleeps, you churn like curd. In emotions, you bloom like a flower.
For me, you are the letter I read on your Facebook. Often, I stumble in the grace of your eyes.
You are an endless question, growing like a banyan tree. Breaking obstacles, you rule like a queen.
Using the phone, without telling me, she waved and left. I saw her today, without stopping. The crescent moon will not fade until the end of my life.
Her beauty is more intense than fire, it burns. My heart jumps with joy.
Who will love, when will it bloom? Who can say? It strikes without telling. My horoscope has love luck.
